creator: peter.henderson@ieee.org
text:
Created attachment 188444
core.txt.1

After using a locked sdcard, mounted ro, I unmounted it and inadvertently attempted to mount it rw.  There was a message to the effect that this wasn't allowed.  When I removed the sdcard, there was a kernel panic.

The sdcard reader is on my Dell monitor.

Output of uname -a:
FreeBSD hydrogen 11.0-RELEASE-p16 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p16 #0 r326382: Thu Nov 30 22:26:02 AEDT 2017     root@hydrogen:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Entries in fstab:
/dev/da1s1              /sdcard         msdosfs rw,noauto       0       0
/dev/da1s1              /sdcard-locked  msdosfs ro,noauto       0       0
